name: Elementalism
description: You exert control over the elements, creating one of the following effects within range: Beckon Air (create a breeze in a 5-foot Cube), Beckon Earth (create dust or write a word in dirt), Beckon Fire (create harmless embers and smoke in a 5-foot Cube that can light candles/torches), Beckon Water (create a spray of cool mist or 1 cup of clean water), or Sculpt Element (shape dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water in a 1-foot Cube for 1 hour).
